message:
refactor(membrane): clean up Stein discrepancy controller implementation

Simplify the kernelized Stein discrepancy module: streamline the
quadrature loop, reduce intermediate allocations, and clarify the
scoring logic for goodness-of-fit threshold comparison. No behavioral
change — same mathematical guarantees, cleaner code structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
